response.global_summary: The video contains a segment from the "Justice 2nd Anniversary Live" event, which includes a song performance followed by a skit/dialogue segment featuring members of the Hololive English 'Justice' unit.

scenes.description: A musical performance segment from the 'Justice' 2nd Anniversary live event featuring vocal music.
A skit and dialogue scene featuring a woman and a child, followed by scenes showcasing plush dolls of the Justice members.
